source_excerpt: It is emphatically the province and duty of the judicial department to say what the law is.
notes: The quote itself appears in the source, but the claim attributes it to Chief Justice Roger Taney in 1819, when in fact the resolved source is Marbury v. Madison, 5 U.S. 137 (1803), authored by Chief Justice John Marshall. Both the author and the year are materially wrong.
